description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on push and pull request events across three jobs: ubuntu, macos, and windows. The ubuntu job uses ubuntu-latest, installs brotli, and runs tests with make. The macos job uses macos-latest and runs tests with make. The windows job uses windows-latest, configures Git, checks out the code, sets up MSBuild, and builds and runs tests with MSBuild and x64 test executable.
